channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Does Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced Have Early Access?
item.content:encoded:
It’s almost time to take to the seven seas once again, as Edward Kenway and the Jackdaw are sailing onto your screens like you’ve never seen before. With a fresh lick of paint and modernised gameplay, Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced is teeing up to be the real deal, but does it have early access?

It’s a thought on plenty of people’s minds, as many clamber to get their hands on the game as soon as possible. Whether it’s nostalgia or genuine adoration, tons of fans want this game as soon as possible, and if there’s a way to bypass the standard release date, they’ll want to know how.

With that in mind, here’s whether Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced has early access.

Does Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced Have Early Access?

It’s bad news for you would-be pirates out there, as there’s no early access for Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced.

Sometimes, early access is offered as a pre-order bonus or as a benefit for ordering a certain edition of the game. However, that’s not the case here, as Ubisoft isn’t providing any way to get your hands on the game ahead of its July 9 release date.

  • More Insider Gaming: Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced Day 1 Update & Patch Notes

That said, it’s not necessarily a bad thing. Black Flag Resynced is a strictly single-player experience, so getting the game early doesn’t provide you with any benefit over anyone else; it’d just be a means to bypass your patience. Since there’s no offer available, you’ll have to wait those extra few days, but is there a way to get a taste of the game in the meantime?

Does Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced Have A Demo?

There’s no better news on this front, either, as there’s no demo available for Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced.

Demos are certainly having a bit of a resurgence, but they’re nowhere near as common as they used to be. They’re a great means for fans to get a taste of a game before committing to a purchase, and with the rising prices of the industry, and freebies are more than welcome.

  • More Insider Gaming: How Long Is Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced?

Unfortunately, that’s not a possibility with Black Flag Resynced, with no early access or demo available. I suppose you could give the original game a go, but with the gameplay changes and modernised graphics, it might pale in comparison to the remake—looks like you’ll just have to wait.

In the meantime, give the trailer another watch; that should tide you over for now.

Would you pay extra to get Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced early? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more Insider Gaming content, check out the Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced Review Embargo Date, and be sure to sign up for our free Weekly Newsletter.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Persona Live-Action Show Reportedly in the Works at Netflix
item.content:encoded:
A new report reveals that Netflix is developing a live-action adaptation of the Persona franchise as a series.

Persona is a widely popular gaming franchise with millions of fans, and expanding into other media is sure to be beneficial. This move will attract more attention to the series, especially since the next installment, Persona 6, was announced during the latest Xbox Games Showcase earlier this month.

Persona Netflix Adaptation is Being Written by VisionQuest’s Writer

A Variety report reveals that Netflix is developing a live-action Persona series. It seems that the adaptation is being written and showrun by Christopher Monfette, who has written shows like 12 Monkeys, Star Trek: Picard, Vision Quest, and more. The show also has Shawn Levy, Dan Levine, and Robert Atwood from 21 Laps, along with Michael Lawrence Goldberg and Timothy I. Stevenson from Story Kitchen attached.

  • More Insider Gaming: Persona 6 Might Not be Years Off Like Players Are Expecting

It’s a good partnership; Netflix already has a history of making gaming adaptations like The Witcher, Arcane, Cyberpunk: Edgerunners, and more. 21 Laps helped produce the platform’s highly popular series, Stranger Things. Story Kitchen also comes with its own gaming adaptation expertise, having worked on projects like Sonic the Hedgehog and upcoming installments such as the live-action adaptations of Tomb Raider and Life is Strange.

  • More Insider Gaming: Persona 6 Could Be Scheduled For 2027, It’s Claimed

What are your thoughts on Persona getting a live-action series on Netflix? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced’s PS5 and PS5 Pro features. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

item.title: Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced PS5 Pro Features Revealed
item.content:encoded:
Ubisoft has revealed all the PS5 and PS5 Pro features players can take advantage of with Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced.

The highly anticipated remake of one of the most popular titles in the Assassin’s Creed series is set to release in less than two weeks. Players can look forward to enhanced visuals and improved gameplay. Additionally, the PS5 Pro will offer further enhancements to this experience.

Black Flag Resynced PS5 and PS5 Pro Graphics Modes

Starting with the PS5 version, “Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced” has been remade using the latest Anvil engine. This upgrade brings several enhancements, including options for 60 FPS, HDR support, Dolby Atmos, DualSense haptic feedback, and more. The PS5 will offer three graphics modes, all featuring a 2160p upscaled resolution:

  • Performance Mode: 60 FPS with standard Ray Tracing
  • Fidelity Mode: 30 FPS with extended Ray Tracing
  • Balanced Mode: 40 FPS with extended Ray Tracing

Ray Tracing Global Illumination will be enabled for all graphics modes on the PS5 and PS5 Pro. Ray-Traced Specular Reflections are available in Balanced and Fidelity modes on PS5 and across all graphics modes on PS5 Pro. PS5 Pro will use significantly more GPU power, providing enhanced ray-tracing performance and having more “headroom for higher fidelity and more stable performance.”

  • More Insider Gaming: Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced on Nintendo Switch 2 Console Platform Status

PS5 Pro Will Feature Strand-Based Hair Simulation for Black Flag Resynced

Moreover, the PS5 Pro version of Black Flag Resynced will simulate and render individual hair strands rather than using traditional hair cards. This stand-based hair will be available for Edward in all modes, for the crowd in Fidelity mode, and cinematics will use this system for all characters regardless of the mode.

Lastly, the upgraded PSSR will provide better image quality and improved reconstruction, reducing the visual gap between performance and fidelity modes. Check out the PS5 Pro modes for Black Flag Resynced below; all will provide 2160p upscaled resolution with enhanced PSSR.

  • Performance Mode: 60 FPS with extended Ray Tracing
  • Fidelity Mode: 30 FPS with extended Ray Tracing
  • Balanced Mode: 40 FPS with extended Ray Tracing

For those wondering, Standard ray tracing will compute global illumination for diffuse lighting throughout the game world. Extended will bring full support of ray tracing to compute global illumination for diffuse lighting and reflective surfaces throughout the game world. All details were provided through a PlayStation blog post.

What are your thoughts on Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced PS5 and PS5 Pro features? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about Battlefield 6 XP Token timer receiving a much-needed change. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.
